task_description: Build a world-class HFT scalping system for XAUUSD 1-minute chart. Analyze 6M ticks of real broker data, backtest multiple strategies, optimize parameters, and produce the highest PnL strategy with minimal drawdown as a production MQL5 EA.

verification.summary: Full pipeline runs successfully. After review fixes (SL/TP ordering, spread tracking, UTC time): Ensemble $307 PnL, 80% win rate, -6.9% max DD, Sharpe 3.08, PF 2.96, positive OOS +$29. OrderFlow $2,519 PnL, 45% WR, -29% DD, Sharpe 3.9 (highest raw PnL but overfit). EA is 700+ lines of valid MQL5 with all safety features. Review issues addressed.
